title: Eating Animation
description: Adds animation for eating food and drinking potions
body:
## Features
### NOTE: Only works for 1.21.4 or above
- Improves the eating/drinking animation of all Food/Drink Items
- Currently supports all items that are eatable by default
- Also works with Potions !!!

I’d be glad to consider adding support for specific mods upon request.


### Demo Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2uGvFtXHhkQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-black; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
